new_value: Reset tx_seq and nonce_exhausted in lichen_link_load_key (link_ctx.c:154-155); atomic rotation now clears latch so new key TX resumes with fresh tuple while old-key tuples stay isolated via per-pubkey replay. Existing link_crypto and link_epoch tests pass; no regression to epoch persist.
